# EnviroAndIPR

> Environmental consultancy, intellectual property rights (IPR), and legal process outsourcing (LPO) services — EIA, compliance, patent search & filing, IP strategy, and legal research under one roof.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of EnviroAndIPR's environmental, IPR, and LPO consultancy.
- [About](/about): Mission, expertise, and team behind EnviroAndIPR.
- [Environmental Services](/environmental-services): EIA reports, environmental clearance, compliance, ESG and CSR reporting.
- [IPR Services](/ipr-services): Patent search, drafting, filing, freedom-to-operate, landscape analysis.
- [LPO Services](/lpo-services): Legal research, contract drafting, document review, compliance support.
- [Services](/services): Combined overview of environmental and IPR services.
- [Blogs](/blogs): Articles on environmental compliance and intellectual property.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch for a free consultation.
